description: Port forward to sandbox gateway is fragile. openshell forward uses sandbox supervisor PID1 internal proxy. Processes started via kubectl exec bypass this routing.
resolution: Use FIFO pipe to feed commands into openshell sandbox connect session so gateway starts through the supervisor.

title: Browser auto-install via Playwright in onboard step 4
rationale: Ubuntu 24.04 chromium-browser is snap stub. Playwright downloads real binary. Non-fatal so onboard continues on failure.
